concept: Create a sports game where the player uses a grappling hook to swing and launch themselves around massive three-dimensional courses in competitive aerial acrobatics. Athletes are scored on speed, precision, style, and the difficulty of tricks performed while airborne between anchor points. Environmental hazards such as gusty wind zones, slippery surfaces, and moving anchor points add challenge to courses as the championship progresses. Players can customize their grappling equipment to favor either speed, control, or trick potential, creating distinct playstyles. The world championship takes place in spectacular venues built among cloud-piercing skyscrapers, ancient ruins, and natural wonders with each location offering unique challenges.
